System information

Read-only, and every value is something the web platform cannot tell a page. Until you register it, it's just a JSON DOM: this window added explorer to it — and could have dropped adapters just as easily (that line is in MainWindow.cs, commented out). 


    

    

        

        

        

            
            
Select a file to preview

        

    


    

        Left: local files via chrome.webview.hostObjects.fs · Right: preview (an <iframe>). The window is NavigationMode.Local.
